backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing customer management, policy tracking with document storage, and alert generation for policy expirations and road tax renewals using stable maps and time-based filtering.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (customer management, policy management, alerts, dashboard, navigation) to their source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend files including pages, hooks, layout components, and styling configuration for the insurance management application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining insurance-themed colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags and title for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS Insurance Management application, loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining seven routes (Dashboard, Customers, Policies, Alerts, Help, Support, Legal) all wrapped in the Layout component with type-safe routing.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Responsive layout component with sticky header navigation, company branding with logo, mobile menu toggle, desktop/mobile nav items with icons, and footer with contact info and social links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatic query invalidation on identity changes, and anonymous actor fallback for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend canister operations including customers, policies, alerts, and expirations with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom insurance-themed color palette (professional blues, gold accents) and alert colors for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider wrapper around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Alerts.tsx: Alerts dashboard page displaying policy and road tax expirations within 30 days with urgency badges and countdown timers.
frontend/src/pages/Customers.tsx: Customer management page with search, add customer dialog, customer list table, and customer policy viewing functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying company branding, statistics cards (customers, policies, expiring policies), and a detailed list of upcoming policy expirations with urgency-based color coding and navigation to policy details.
frontend/src/pages/Help.tsx: Help documentation page with an FAQ accordion covering common tasks like adding customers/policies, understanding alerts, supported file formats, search functionality, and data security information.
frontend/src/pages/Legal.tsx: Legal information page displaying Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, IRDAI compliance details, and disclaimer information for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS insurance management system.
frontend/src/pages/Policies.tsx: Policies management page with table view, company filtering, add policy dialog with file upload support, expiry badge indicators, and validation for policy dates and required fields.
frontend/src/pages/Support.tsx: Support and contact page displaying phone number, email address, business hours, and services offered by KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS with call-to-action buttons.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme (insurance-themed colors, alerts), typography, animations, container settings, and extended design tokens using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project state file defining an insurance management application for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS with features for customer/policy management, expiration alerts, document uploads, and PDF generation. Tracks existing features, requirements, architectural notes, and branding specifications including IRDAI registration details.
